_meta.description: Checkpoint questions for replay sandbox evaluation. Frozen — do not modify after first run.
_meta.authored: PENDING — fill in gold answers from frozen_saxenauts.db before first graded run

questions.question: What is the user's primary project as of late August 2025?
questions.rubric: CORRECT if response names the main project or system the user was building

questions.question: What AI tools or platforms has the user been using most actively in September 2025?
questions.rubric: CORRECT if response names at least 2 correct platforms (codex, opencode, claude, etc.)

questions.question: What is the user working on around mid-October 2025?
questions.rubric: CORRECT if response names a project or task that matches the October activity

questions.question: What decisions or architectural changes has the user made in November 2025?
questions.rubric: CORRECT if response names at least one concrete technical or design decision from November

questions.question: What is the user's primary focus in the final week of the dataset (around March 10-17, 2026)?
questions.rubric: CORRECT if response correctly identifies the main project or activity in early March 2026
